seoTitle: Beaumont vs Beaumonts — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beaumont and Beaumonts. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beaumont and Beaumonts.
heading: Beaumont vs Beaumonts — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beaumont, South Australia and Beaumonts, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaumont and Beaumonts have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Beaumont or Beaumonts safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beaumont has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Beaumonts scores 31/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beaumont scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Beaumonts scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beaumont or Beaumonts?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaumont has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
